节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

注释信息: @returns { AtManager } returns the instance of the AtManager.
节点.return_description: returns the instance of the AtManager.

节点.功能描述: Checks whether a specified application has been granted the given permission.
注释信息: @param { number } tokenID - Token ID of the application.
@param { Permissions } permissionName - Name of the permission to be verified. The Permissions type supports only valid permission names.

parameters.说明: Name of the permission to be verified. The Permissions type supports only valid permission names.

节点.功能描述: Checks whether a specified application has been granted the given permission.
注释信息: @param { number } tokenID - Token ID of the application.
@param { string } permissionName - Name of the permission to be verified.

parameters.说明: Name of the permission to be verified.

节点.功能描述: Checks whether a specified application has been granted the given permission synchronously.
注释信息: @param { number } tokenID - Token ID of the application.
@param { Permissions } permissionName - Name of the permission to be verified.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types.
@throws { BusinessError } 12100001 - Invalid parameter. The tokenID is 0, or the permissionName exceeds 256 characters.

parameters.说明: Name of the permission to be verified.

error_codes.description: Parameter error. Possible causes: 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types.
Invalid parameter. The tokenID is 0, or the permissionName exceeds 256 characters.

节点.功能描述: Checks whether a specified application has been granted the given permission. On the cross-platform, this function can be used to check the permission grant status for the current application only.
注释信息: @param { number } tokenID - Token ID of the application.
@param { Permissions } permissionName - Name of the permission to be verified.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types.
@throws { BusinessError } 12100001 - Invalid parameter. The tokenID is 0, or the permissionName exceeds 256 characters.

parameters.说明: Name of the permission to be verified.

error_codes.description: Parameter error. Possible causes: 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types.
Invalid parameter. The tokenID is 0, or the permissionName exceeds 256 characters.

注释信息: @param { number } tokenID - Token ID of the application.
@param { Permissions } permissionName - Name of the permission to be verified.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types.
@throws { BusinessError } 12100001 - Invalid parameter. The tokenID is 0, or the permissionName exceeds 256 characters.

parameters.说明: Name of the permission to be verified.

error_codes.description: Parameter error. Possible causes: 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types.
Invalid parameter. The tokenID is 0, or the permissionName exceeds 256 characters.

节点.功能描述:
Requests certain permissions from the user.
The context must belong to the Stage model and only supports UIAbilityContext and UIExtensionContext.
注释信息: @param { Context } context - The context that initiates the permission request.
@param { Array<Permissions> } permissionList - Indicates the list of permissions to be requested. This parameter cannot be null or empty.
@param { AsyncCallback<PermissionRequestResult> } requestCallback Callback for the result from requesting permissions.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types.
@throws { BusinessError } 12100001 - Invalid parameter. The context is invalid when it does not belong to the application itself.

parameters.说明: The context that initiates the permission request.
Indicates the list of permissions to be requested. This parameter cannot be null or empty.
Callback for the result from requesting permissions.

error_codes.description: Parameter error. Possible causes: 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types.
Invalid parameter. The context is invalid when it does not belong to the application itself.

节点.功能描述:
Requests certain global switch status on setting from the user.
The context must belong to the Stage model and only supports UIAbilityContext and UIExtensionContext.
注释信息: @param { Context } context - The context that initiates the permission request.
@param { SwitchType } type - Indicates the type of global switch to be requested. This parameter cannot be null or empty.
@returns { Promise<boolean> } Returns the status of the specified global switch.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2. Incorrect parameter types.
@throws { BusinessError } 12100001 - Invalid parameter. Possible causes: 1. The context is invalid because it does not belong to the application itself; 2. The type of global switch is not support.
@throws { BusinessError } 12100013 - The specific global switch is already open.

parameters.说明: The context that initiates the permission request.
Indicates the type of global switch to be requested. This parameter cannot be null or empty.

节点.return_description: Returns the status of the specified global switch.

error_codes.description: Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2. Incorrect parameter types.
Invalid parameter. Possible causes: 1. The context is invalid because it does not belong to the application itself; 2. The type of global switch is not support.
The specific global switch is already open.
